purpose: Hands-only shot of product being held or used. No face visible. Solves face-visibility compliance gracefully.

subject_description.description: The subject (product, person, scene) to be rendered

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Authentic close-up hand photography showing only hands and forearms interacting with {product_descriptor}, Saudi or Arab natural medium-warm skin tone, neat well-groomed nails, {gender_specific_details}, no face visible, shot from slight overhead angle as if first-person POV, natural daylight from window, soft directional shadow, real skin texture with subtle wrinkles and natural skin markings, hands holding product naturally, focal length 35mm phone camera, candid non-staged composition, warm ambient surroundings slightly out of focus, authentic moment of use {cultural_constraints_injection}
anti_patterns: Never present non-Saudi talent or generic Middle-Eastern look — Saudi specificity is the point
Avoid tourist-photography aesthetic; this is lived-in lifestyle, not destination shoot
notes: Intents: launch, grow, harvest. Source code in research corpus: S04. Saudi adaptation guidance: Critical for brands with face_visibility_permission false. Default skin tone warm medium Mediterranean Arab. Henna detail for female brands subtle pattern at thumb base, not elaborate bridal henna. Reference image: Required. Recommended frequency: 3-4 per week (default UGC for face-restricted brands). Compliance level: standard (face-free).
